action.description: A deep link or hook URL that is opened via HookUtils.openHookDirect when the user taps the footer text. When null or empty, the footer text has no click behavior.

id.description: Unique identifier for the footer component, used to match remote config data to screen component definitions via componentId lookup.

text.description: Text configuration for the footer, containing the display string and its color. Mapped to a TextConfig entity used to render the footer TextView.

color.description: The color applied to the footer text via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy. When non-empty, it is resolved as a cascade color path; when empty, the default tint3 background color is used.

new_field.description: A field deserialized from the API response but not currently used in any mapper or UI rendering logic.

text.description: The display text shown in the footer TextView. If this value is empty or null, the entire footer view is hidden (visibility set to GONE).
